title: The Jungle Princess
writer: Cyril Hume, Gerald Geraghty, Gouverneur Morris
actors: Dorothy Lamour, Ray Milland, Akim Tamiroff
plot: Christopher Powell is in Malaysia with his fiancée and her father, capturing wild animals. While out hunting, he is attacked by a tiger, and his native guides run away, leaving him for dead. But the tiger is the pet of Ulah, a bea...
